login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
login.rateLimitBanner: Too many login attempts. Use OTP to sign in securely.
login.sideDescription: Connect with thousands of verified service providers. Book, manage, and review — all in one place.

register.phoneValidation: Phone number should be exactly 10 digits.
register.passwordRule: Use 8+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
register.vendorLocationNote: You'll set your work location during onboarding after approval.
register.sideVendorDesc: Reach thousands of customers, and watch your business grow with VendorCenter.
register.sideCustomerDesc: Discover verified professionals near you. Book trusted services in just a few taps.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.emailSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset code
forgotPassword.otpSubtitle: Enter the verification code sent to your email
forgotPassword.sideDescription: We'll send a verification code to your email to help you reset your password securely.

validation.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain a lowercase letter
validation.passwordSpecial: Password must contain a special character
validation.phone10Digits: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits
